mission_09:
steps:
  - name: Checkout Code
    uses: actions/checkout@v3
  - name: Build
    run: npm run build
  - name: Notify Slack
    if: always()
    uses: slackapi/slack-github-action@v1
    with:
      payload: '{"text":"Build completed!"}'
    env:
      SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL: ${{ secrets.SLACK_WEBHOOK }}
